optimizerView.title: Crafting optimizer
optimizerView.intro: Find the strategy with the lowest expected cost to reach your target: all rolled affixes must be valid, and optionally every affix must be tier 1. Current dataset uses the local sample pool; PoE2DB-backed expansion is the next step.

inputs.title: Optimization inputs
inputs.requireTierOne: Require all affixes to be tier 1

result.title: Optimization result
result.note: Strategies are ranked by expected cost per success. If a strategy has zero success, it is ranked by success rate.

optimizerView.error: Could not load optimization result. Please try again.
